---
name: New Equipment Documentation
about: Request safety documentation (Risk Assessment + Safe Work Procedure) for new equipment or a new activity. A draft is generated automatically from this issue and opened as a PR for expert review.
title: '[NEW] '
labels: 'new-equipment, documentation'
assignees: ''
---

<!--
How this works: an AI drafter reads the fields below and generates ONE data file
(documents/<slug>.yaml) that produces the web pages, official Word forms and PDFs.
It opens a DRAFT pull request; a qualified person must review every value before
anything is approved. The more specific your entries (exact model, wavelengths,
temperatures, interlocks), the better the draft.

Trigger: the Claude Code routine fires automatically when this issue is opened
(label new-equipment). If it doesn't fire, close and reopen the issue, or an
admin can use "Run now" on the routine at claude.ai/code/routines.

Formatting: keep the bold field labels exactly as they are — they are parsed
programmatically. Write your answer after the colon (single line or bullet list).
-->

## Equipment Information

**Equipment Name:**

**Manufacturer & Model:**

**Location:**

**Primary Use:**

**Equipment Slug** *(lowercase, hyphen-separated filename — e.g. `bambu-h2d`, `fume-hood`, `sem-zeiss`)*:

**Prepared By** *(optional — defaults to the issue author)*:

**Responsible Supervisors** *(optional — defaults to the lab supervisors)*:

## Documentation Required

*(An RA and SWP are always generated as a pair from one data file.)*

- [ ] Risk Assessment + Safe Work Procedure

**Safety Systems/Interlocks:**

## Additional Information

**Manufacturer Documentation Available:**
- [ ] User manual
- [ ] Safety data sheets

**Similar Equipment Already in Use:**

**Estimated Number of Users:**

**Target Completion Date:**

## Checklist Before Submission

- [ ] Equipment has been received or purchase is confirmed
- [ ] Manufacturer documentation has been reviewed
- [ ] Preliminary hazard assessment has been considered
- [ ] Safety officer has been notified (if required)
- [ ] Installation requirements are understood
